title: hephaestus-character-sheet
prompt:
A character model sheet / animation turntable, on a clean plain white studio background.

SUBJECT — extract and render ONLY the bearded, fair-haired smith on the LEFT of the reference image. Ignore the gold automata and the industrial background entirely. He is HEPHAESTUS: a MIDDLE-AGED smith (not an old man, not white-haired), broad and stooped in build, fair/blond shoulder-length hair, a full beard, a weary tender watchful expression. He wears a pale cream work-robe draped off one shoulder. He is lame — he favors one stiff leg and stands with a stooped, off-balance stance. Keep his exact face, hair, beard, build and costume identical across every view.

LAYOUT — a multi-angle turntable spread, evenly and identically lit across all views:
- full-body FRONT view
- full-body THREE-QUARTER FRONT view
- full-body BACK view
plus two detail callout panels: a head-and-shoulders close-up of his face, and a close-up of his lamed/favored leg and stance.

STYLE — painterly cinematic concept-art rendering matching the reference image's medium and palette (warm gold skin tones against cool light, rich brushwork). NOT photoreal, NOT a flat line drawing.

Clean white background, no environment, no other characters, no props beyond his costume, only faint angle markers. 16:9 aspect ratio.
